access_string.description: Specifies the access permissions for the ElastiCache user.

engine.description: The database engine used by the ElastiCache user, such as Redis.

no_password_required.description: Indicates whether the user can access ElastiCache without a password.

passwords.description: A set of passwords for the ElastiCache user, allowing multiple passwords to be set.

user_id.description: A unique identifier for the ElastiCache user.

user_name.description: The name assigned to the ElastiCache user.
